message:
test(db): add inbox stats cache lifecycle stress tests and polling benchmarks (br-1i11.1.3)

Stress tests (stress.rs):
- Add helpers: create_message_for_receiver(), get_inbox_stats(), mark_message_read(),
  acknowledge_message() for cache lifecycle testing
- Add static INBOX_STATS_TEST_MUTEX for cache test isolation across threads
- Test cache miss → read-through → population → hit lifecycle
- Test cache short-circuits DB on hit (cached values returned, not DB values)
- Test cache invalidation on: mark_message_read(), acknowledge_message(),
  create_message_with_recipients() events

Load benchmarks (load_bench.rs):
- Add run_inbox_stats_polling_phase() helper with configurable invalidation
- Scenario E: Inbox-stats polling cache effectiveness benchmark measuring
  latency under cache-hit vs forced-invalidation workloads
- Track per-table query counts via QUERY_TRACKER for cache bypass detection

Ensures inbox stats cache (built in previous epic) is properly wired,
invalidated on mutations, and delivers measurable latency improvement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
